title: Phase 35 — 72-Hour Monitoring Report

allPagesRemoval.expectedOutcome: Should disappear from GSC after Google recrawls (1-4 weeks). 10 URL Inspections submitted Jun 25 to accelerate.

contentClicks.target: First non-tool content click by Week 3 (Jul 16)

gscRemovalsStatus.status: Submitted — Google processing. Check after Jul 2.

answers.didBlog20kCTRImprove: UNKNOWN — Data window is pre-fix. Blog had 0 impressions in 7d GSC page dimension but 344/28d previously. Need broader URL matching.
answers.didAllPagesDisappear: NOT YET — 4 impressions still showing (pre-fix data). Should decline after Google recrawls.
answers.didContentClicksIncrease: NO — 0 content clicks. All 1 site-wide click from /tools/investment-25k-10yr (tool variant).
answers.isAdSenseStillStable: YES — AdSense approved Jun 21, no changes to review-critical pages.
answers.areWeCloserToTrafficRevenueGoals: TOO EARLY — Phase 35 deployed 36 hours ago. GSC data has 3-day lag. First measurable signal expected Jun 28-29. Current metrics are pre-fix baseline.

Critical bug fixes (security, 500 errors, broken pages)

status: MONITORING — No action needed. Phase 35 fixes deployed, waiting for Google recrawl and GSC data to catch up.
